tasks.title: T1 — Document caveman/terse composition in `docs/command-voice-standard.md`: add concise rules showing terse/caveman-lite as wording-density layer over existing prose-load reduction templates; preserve exact contract-token exceptions. Verification: targeted asset test or existing docs assertion covers new rule.
tasks.summary: Added `### Terse/caveman-lite composition` to command voice standard and asset test asserting composition wording and exact contract-token preservation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `### Terse/caveman-lite composition` to command voice standard and asset test asserting composition wording and exact contract-token preservation.

tasks.title: T2 — Add phrase-preservation and compression-guard tests for `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md`: assert critical safety/workflow tokens survive compression and composition docs exist; avoid brittle prose snapshots. Verification: tests fail before docs/compression where possible, pass after.
tasks.summary: Added `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md compression guards` asset test and matching `### Instruction Compression Guard` text preserving exact contract tokens through compression.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md compression guards` asset test and matching `### Instruction Compression Guard` text preserving exact contract tokens through compression.

tasks.title: T3 — Compress `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md` using approved design: tables/fragments over paragraphs; remove duplication; keep exact tool names, gates, statuses, commands, `MUST`/`NEVER`, approval boundaries, cancellation/archive clarity, JSON/code examples. Verification: focused asset tests pass and line count decreases under guard.
tasks.summary: Compressed `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md` from 953 to 868 lines by reducing sub-agent, skill, command/skill boundary, and worktree sections into tables/fragments while preserving tested contract tokens and safety wording.
tasks.implementation_summary: Compressed `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md` from 953 to 868 lines by reducing sub-agent, skill, command/skill boundary, and worktree sections into tables/fragments while preserving tested contract tokens and safety wording.

tasks.title: T4 — Update post-compression budget/sync artifacts and verify: adjust `.opencode/token-budgets.json` baseline to new `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md` line count if reduced, run focused tests, run `./scripts/sync-global.sh --fix`, then `./scripts/sync-global.sh --check`. Verification: all commands pass; no runtime code/schema/state changes.
tasks.verification: Final line count 871; updated advInstructionsLineBaseline to 871. Focused line guard/slop assets passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts src/adv-slop-scan-assets.test.ts (52 tests).

wisdom.content: `scripts/sync-global.sh --fix/--check` reports canonical primary checkout path for ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md prompt scoping even when invoked from an ADV worktree. Worktree-local instruction edits are not loaded into live global provider prompts until merge/archive sync + OpenCode restart.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal/problem/scope with reply: approve

discovery.approval_evidence: Agreement approved by user continuation reply. Current-state evidence, objectives, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and constraints captured in agreement. Proposal/problem statement repaired to remove scaffold ambiguity before gate completion.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed after independent adv-researcher validator returned VALIDATED. Required refinement applied: terse/caveman-lite composes with existing prose-load infrastructure; no competing profile. No user-value/product tradeoff or contract-compromise risk remains.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep/task graph. Tasks: tk-a6d6924b32be docs composition rule; tk-210f6e29031f phrase/compression tests; tk-2a8d7a43f8d5 compress ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md; tk-ebb2cc11b7ea budget/sync verification.

execution.approval_evidence: All four planned tasks completed with checkpoint commits. Worktree clean. Verification passed: focused Vitest asset tests (66 tests), sync-global --fix, sync-global --check, and pnpm run check. ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md compressed to 868 lines.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Re-applying acceptance completion against current project Temporal after archive reported Temporal incomplete despite disk gates done. User accepted delivered work. Verification passed: focused tests, full pnpm test, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, sync-global check.

release.approval_evidence: Re-applying release completion against current project Temporal after archive reported Temporal incomplete despite disk gates done. User signed off archive/release. Validation passed with warnings only; conformance has no locked specs.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
